meaning: n.挖掘,发掘,挖掘成的洞,出土文物
examples: She worked on the excavation of a Mayan archaeological site.
Hopefully, further excavation of Catalhoyuk will yield more clues.
About nine metres of the boat's length was recovered; one end lay beyond the excavation and had to be left.
The hole was the result of excavation work being carried out at the site.
Heavy excavation work began late at night and into the early morning on Thursday.
